titleStmt.title: SII 30.195: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 195. (A.R. No. 271 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam (Pudūr), Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Rudrakōṭīsvara temple-on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the same shrine Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa II: year 3: 1136 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. It begins with the praśasti, Pūmēvu vaḷar etc. and registers the royal grant of Anapāyanallūr which was separated from Rājēndrasōḻanallūr (inclusive of Avvēlur and Veṇkarpāḍi) as a dēvadāna to the deity Sri Rudrasōlai uḍaiya Mahādēva at Karaikkōṭṭu Brahmadēsam alias Dīnachintāmaṇich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmarnāḍu, a sub division of Dāmark-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is stated that as the temple did not have any dēvadāna land previously, the order was made at the instance of Kulōttuṅgasōḻa Savarnādhirājaṉ. When the king was seated on the thrown in the abhīsheka maṇḍapa of his palace at Vikramachōḻapuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevu vaḷar tirupponmārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nilamperutu ciṟappa vicayamāmakaḷ
velpuyat tiruppa Icaivin celva Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka niruparvan=tiṟaiñ
rntu cīr vaḷartarum Aṇimuṭi kavitteṉa maṇimuṭicūṭi mallaiñālattup pala
miyalviṉileyta veṇkuṭainiḻaṟ ceṅkolocci vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻi
ṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesari va
kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu mūṉṟu nāḷ vikkiramacoḻapurattu koyiliṉuḷḷāl Apiṣekamaṇṭapattu muttupaṉtal kiḻ
paḷḷippiṭattu Eḻuṉtaruḷiyiruṉ(t)tu ceyyat tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷiṉapaṭi tāmaṟkoṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭuk kaṭaikkoṭṭu brammatecamāṉa tiṉacintā
maṇic caruppetimaṅkalattu śrīuruttira colai Uṭaiya mahātevarkku muṉpu tevatāṉamillaiyeṉṟu Ittevarkku Avveḷūrum veṇkaṟpā
ṭiyumāṉa Irājentiracoḻa nallūril Avveḷūr nilattile Aiññūṟṟukkala nellukku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu Aṉapāyanallūreṉṉum
perāl veṟupiṟikkap peṟaveṇṭumeṉṟu Ikkoyiliṟ piṭārar tirucciṟṟampala nampiyaik kāṭṭi kulottuṅkacoḻa savarṇādhirājaṉ namakku coṉṉamaiyi
l tāmarkkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu Avveḷūrum veṇkaṟppāṭiyumāna rājen=tiracoḻanallūril Avveḷūr nilattu Iṭum muṉṟupū viḷai nilam Araiye ya
raikkāṇikkiḻ nāṉmāvarai Irupū viḷainilam Oṉṟemukkāle nāṉ māvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye yaraikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻarai Orupū vi
ḷainilam Ēḻe Eḻumāvarai muntirikaik kīḻ mukkāl Āka nirnilam Oṉpatemukkāle Iraṇṭu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻoṉpatu māvaraiyinā
Digital edition of SII 30.195 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
